headline: RBC Capital Maintains Sector Perform on Exelon, Lowers Price Target to $48
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Stephen D'Ambrisi   maintains Exelon (NASDAQ:EXC) with a Sector Perform and lowers the price target from $51 to $48.
